title: Meta Quest 2 Hat
description: This Resource pack adds the Meta Quest 2 headset and controllers into the game as a carved pumpkin
body:
This Resource pack adds Quest 2 headset and controllers models into the game as carved pumpkins


Headset Command
/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=1]

Controller Command
/give @s minecraft:carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=2]

Models and Textures from:
https://modrinth.com/mod/vr-gear
